base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of jeff — a character (playable) from 1994 earthbound. Jeff — boarding-school genius. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Jeff — boarding-school genius; uses tools/guns. No PSI but 'check' broken-items for upgrades
